name: morpeko-full-belly
flavor_texts: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.
It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.
text: Morpeko-full-belly is the Two-Sided Pokémon. It is a electric and dark-type Pokémon. Abilities: hunger-switch. Base stats — HP: 58, Attack: 95, Defense: 58, Sp. Atk: 70, Sp. Def: 58, Speed: 97. Evolution line: morpeko. Lore: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity. It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.
